title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A TUBERCULOSIS PAVILION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF, CAIBIRAN SUBPROV1NCE OF BILIRAN, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREOF.

chunks.text:
H. No. 5327 / 58 OG No. 27, 4817 (July 2, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3412, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF A TUBERCULOSIS PAVILION IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF, CAIBIRAN SUBPROV1NCE OF BILIRAN, PROVINCE OF LEYTE, AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREOF.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established, under the direct supervision of the Director of Disease Control, a tuberculosis pavilion in the Municipality of Caibiran, Sub-province of Biliran, Province of Leyte.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Health shall issue such rules and regulations as may be necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act.

SEC. 3. The sum of one hundred thousand pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated, out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, for the establishment, operation and maintenance of said pavilion during the fiscal year nineteen hundred sixty-two. Such sums as may be needed for the same purpose in subsequent years shall be included in the annual General Appropriation Acts.

SEC. 4. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
